description_long: This surveillance camera features a robust, rectangular box housing with a slightly tapered rear section and a prominent mounting arm extending downward, resembling an industrial or municipal installation. The main body is predominantly white with red accent lines and subtle weathering, suggesting outdoor use. The front face is equipped with two large circular lenses or sensors, likely for dual-camera or night vision functionality, and is bordered by red stripes for visibility. The top of the housing includes a small antenna for wireless communication and a recessed panel, possibly for maintenance access. The sides display control panels, indicator lights, and a rotary knob, indicating some local adjustability or configuration. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and reinforced edges, emphasizing durability and security.
description: A robust, white box-style surveillance camera with dual front lenses, red accents, and a sturdy mounting arm, designed for outdoor urban monitoring.
description_view_0: Side view showing the control panel, rotary knob, indicator lights, and the mounting arm extending downward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two large circular lenses and red accent stripes, with the mounting arm centered below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar control panel layout and visible rear taper, showing the mounting arm.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a vented panel, antenna, and the back of the mounting arm.
